inputs.label: Bogey Rating
inputs.businessContext: The expected score for a bogey golfer under normal course and weather conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: The expected score for a bogey golfer under normal course and weather conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal saha ve hava koşullarında bir bogey golfçüsü için beklenen skor.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die erwartete Punktzahl eines Bogey-Golfers unter normalen Platz- und Wetterbedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score attendu pour un golfeur bogey dans des conditions normales de parcours et de météo.
businessContext_i18n.es: La puntuación esperada para un golfista bogey en condiciones normales de campo y clima.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النتيجة المتوقعة للاعب بوجي في ظروف الملعب والطقس العادية.

inputs.label: Scratch Course Rating
inputs.businessContext: The expected score for a scratch golfer under normal course and weather conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: The expected score for a scratch golfer under normal course and weather conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Normal saha ve hava koşullarında bir sıfır handikap golfçüsü için beklenen skor.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die erwartete Punktzahl eines Scratch-Golfers unter normalen Platz- und Wetterbedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score attendu pour un golfeur scratch dans des conditions normales de parcours et de météo.
businessContext_i18n.es: La puntuación esperada para un golfista scratch en condiciones normales de campo y clima.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النتيجة المتوقعة للاعب سكراتش في ظروف الملعب والطقس العادية.

inputs.label: Slope Factor
inputs.businessContext: Constant multiplier to convert rating difference to slope (5.381 for men, 4.24 for women).

businessContext_i18n.en: Constant multiplier to convert rating difference to slope (5.381 for men, 4.24 for women).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Derece farkını eğime dönüştürmek için sabit çarpan (erkekler için 5,381, kadınlar için 4,24).
businessContext_i18n.de: Konstanter Multiplikator zur Umrechnung der Rating-Differenz in Slope (5,381 für Männer, 4,24 für Frauen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur constant pour convertir la différence de rating en pente (5,381 pour les hommes, 4,24 pour les femmes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador constante para convertir la diferencia de rating en pendiente (5.381 para hombres, 4.24 para mujeres).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف ثابت لتحويل فرق التصنيف إلى انحدار (5.381 للرجال، 4.24 للنساء).

inputs.label: Gross Score
inputs.businessContext: Actual strokes taken by the player in the round.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual strokes taken by the player in the round.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oyuncunun turda attığı gerçek vuruş sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Schläge des Spielers in der Runde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coups réels effectués par le joueur lors de la partie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Golpes reales realizados por el jugador en la ronda.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضربات الفعلية التي قام بها اللاعب في الجولة.
